Quarter-on-quarter growth from a weekly level series

Source: R/analytics-cor.R
build_wai_qoq_mean_series.Rd

Averages the level index by quarter and computes annualized quarter-on-quarter growth in percent.

Usage

build_wai_qoq_mean_series(level_df)

Arguments

level_df

Data frame with time (Date) and value (level).

Value

Data frame with quarterly time and growth value.

Examples

lv <- data.frame(time = seq(as.Date("2020-01-07"), by = "week", length.out = 150),
                 value = 100 * cumprod(1 + rnorm(150, 0, 0.002)))
head(build_wai_qoq_mean_series(lv))
#> # A tibble: 6 × 2
#>   time         value
#>   <date>       <dbl>
#> 1 2020-04-01 -0.455 
#> 2 2020-07-01  0.390 
#> 3 2020-10-01  1.19  
#> 4 2021-01-01 -0.0235
#> 5 2021-04-01  3.72  
#> 6 2021-07-01  3.13
